definitions.text: To cause to rise; to lift or elevate.
examples: to raise your hand if you want to say something; to raise your walking stick to defend yourself

definitions.text: To form by the accumulation of materials or constituent parts; to build up; to erect.
examples: to raise a wall, or a heap of stones

definitions.text: To cause something to come to the surface of water.
examples: The ship was raised ten years after it had sunk.

definitions.text: Ellipsis of pay raise (“an increase in wages or salary”).
examples: The boss gave me a raise.

definitions.text: A shot in which the delivered stone bumps another stone forward.
A bet that increases the previous bet.
A cairn or pile of stones.
